queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating effect of the absence of a checking account on credit default probability.
Determinants of credit risk: The influence of loan duration in months on reducing default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of reduced credit risk: The impact of critical account status or other existing credits on default likelihood.
